window_summary: This window tracks the recent n8n-io/n8n release stream across multiple version lines, including 1.x and 2.x series, with bug fixes, security patches, and feature additions such as MCP tooling and AI builder improvements.

chunks.title: n8n@2.22.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: n8n-io/n8n
Release: n8n@2.22.0
Tag: n8n@2.22.0; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-19T12:08:27Z; created_at: 2026-05-19T11:36:59Z
Release notes:
# [2.22.0](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/compare/n8n@2.21.0...n8n@2.22.0) (2026-05-19)
### Bug Fixes
* Add Switch fallback output guidance for workflow builder ([#30449](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30449)) ([17b64da](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/17b64da0f00f7a3c8cda32b6adb75c6c67eec261))
* **ai-builder:** Ground workflow setup guidance ([#30638](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30638)) ([0d262fe](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/0d262fe638877e0301cafcce636228c4000c65c7))
* **ai-builder:** Guide builder to prefer httpBearerAuth for Bearer flows ([#30309](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30309)) ([c3e39f8](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/c3e39f850423d5e98095ebf40e04a687309cd476))
* Allow service-specific MCP OAuth credentials to be used with MCP endpoint domains ([#30343](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30343)) ([3dda7b7](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/3dda7b706a582f90e6176c1d79884b7869810dc2))
* **core:** Add correct telemetry for resumed Instance AI runs ([#30335](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30335)) ([8489afd](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/8489afdcd1889a049a3df76fa578602d051b0d99))
* **core:** Add input validation for workflow and data table names ([#30594](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30594)) ([d14c71e](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/d14c71eaa70bcd47cd77ac35fd997a2cdc1584fe))
* **core:** Add Instance AI first-turn guidance and trace metadata ([#30315](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30315)) ([5d872d1](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/5d872d13755e2d24cfc4cbd59152c4aff53e70c0))
* **core:** Add origin-only fallback to MCP OAuth discovery for path-bearing server URLs ([#30231](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30231)) ([fb78047](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/fb78047d9ad315b865748d64473f253e7b55b8b7))
* **core:** Align MCP OAuth issued aud with advertised resource URL ([#30055](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30055)) ([9d4fc35](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/9d4fc35a5c00b87af1aa6758f32b6250eb292e56))
* **core:** Avoid unnecessary planner credential prompts ([#30451](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30451)) ([f1fd79f](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/f1fd79f830b5b8694ca0ee4cfb66ada77c3bb7e4))
* **core:** Bypass archived workflows in activation ([#30517](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30517)) ([3bab056](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/3bab056b42e8d8654f2ec8d8b0f84274944809ce))
* **core:** Clean up failed AI workflow shells ([#30432](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30432)) ([d26a402](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/d26a402acc7cc4990291a16e6b1018ac9af142ea))
* **core:** Extract workflow-sdk examples to a writable cache dir ([#30433](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30433)) ([6beed60](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/6beed60969feee7d12c5e231078daaa2f882e00f))
* **core:** Limit Insights compaction runs ([#30503](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30503)) ([d67cef8](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/d67cef8b25626c18583a9fe2749d659490bc67e9))
* **core:** Member role getting read permissions for insights ([#30291](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30291)) ([111d403](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/111d403aa7ead1f22d81ecacb3c6a3f06b7d74d1))
* **core:** Preserve AxiosHeaders instance when applying OpenAI vendor defaults ([#29860](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29860)) ([3dd134a](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/3dd134ab3ce5bf602bcd8d174376439d490579eb))
* **core:** Preserve nested arrays in VM expression engine output ([#30246](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/30246)) ([c2ecb4d](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/c2ecb4d04b7f490c13f1cf36344838527ff1fe82))
* **core:** Prioritize HTTP status codes for retry logic in `httpRequest` nodes ([#27547](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/27547)) ([87ba302]...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the n8n-io/n8n release n8n@2.22.0, a prerelease, numerous bug fixes are included such as adding Switch fallback output guidance for workflow builder, AI builder grounding workflow setup guidance, allowing service-specific MCP OAuth credentials, adding input validation for workflow and data table names, preserving nested arrays in VM expression engine output, and prioritizing HTTP status codes for retry logic in httpRequest nodes.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the n8n-io/n8n release n8n@2.23.0, a prerelease, numerous bug fixes are included such as AI builder defaulting Switch to case-insensitive in builder hints, Azure Cosmos DB Node preserving query parameter types, Bitbucket Node using supported workspace listing endpoint, bumping urllib3 constraint to >=2.7.0, core acquiring expression isolate for scheduled polls, allowing dynamic credential OAuth callbacks without skip-auth env var, allowing personal project owners to manage data redaction, allowing shadowing dangerous globals as variable names in workflow SDK, allowing Unicode characters in execution metadata keys, bypassing pubsub debounce for workflow activation display commands, counting agent background generation tokens, excluding error workflow executions from time saved insights, guiding agent to not pass bogus workflow-id to submit-workflow tool, handling null pinData column at executions, honoring chunkSize when streaming S3-backed binary data, improving license diagnostics and CLI output, improving project routing for MCP-built workflows, and keeping Instance AI HITL confirmations waiting.

# [2.25.0](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/compare/n8n@2.24.0...n8n@2.25.0) (2026-06-02)

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the n8n-io/n8n release beta, a prerelease, the core fixes error workflows showing up as separate span in otel traces and adds a validate_node_config MCP tool for per-node validation.

questions.query_text: In the n8n-io/n8n releases, which release includes a fix for the Insights page showing a license paywall for licensed users, along with reverting input validation for workflow and data table names?

answer_support.answer_text: fixes Insights page showing license paywall for licensed users ... reverts input validation for workflow and data table names

questions.query_text: Across the n8n-io/n8n releases, how does the handling of scheduled polls differ between n8n@2.21.6 and n8n@2.21.7?

options.text: 2.21.6 acquires expression isolate for scheduled polls, while 2.21.7 additionally reports scheduled-poll isolate acquisition failures via __emitError.
2.21.6 reports scheduled-poll isolate acquisition failures via __emitError, while 2.21.7 removes that reporting.
Both releases only validate non-empty prompts in AI vendor nodes without any scheduled poll changes.
2.21.6 removes expression isolate acquisition, while 2.21.7 adds it back.

questions.expected_answer: 2.21.6 acquires expression isolate for scheduled polls, while 2.21.7 additionally reports scheduled-poll isolate acquisition failures via __emitError.

answer_support.answer_text: acquires expression isolate for scheduled polls
acquires expression isolate for scheduled polls ... reports scheduled-poll isolate acquisition failures via __emitError

questions.query_text: In the n8n-io/n8n release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that limits Insights compaction runs and fixes a langsmith security issue, (2) a release that requires admin push when migrating legacy environments to projects folder, (3) a release that fixes 16 security issues in vm2, ws, protobufjs and more, and upgrades urllib3.

answer_support.answer_text: limits Insights compaction runs and fixes a security issue in langsmith
requires admin push when migrating legacy environments to projects folder
fixes 16 security issues in vm2, ws, protobufjs and 4 more, and fixes a security issue in urllib3
